chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1088 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). 1. For orders on CMA No.4928/2022 2. For hearing of Main Case. 23.05.2022 Mr. Ghulam Nabi Sher, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, D.A.G. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate, for the Respondent No.2..-.-.-. Since the matter requires ascertainment of facts with regard to the consignment imported by the petitioner, we deem it necessary that Customs Authority to form Steel Committee for ascertainment of the goods, which should decide the matter of the petitioner within fifteen days’ time from the date of receipt of this order. It is clarified that said Committee would only pass the order after examining the goods in detail and providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. With these directions the instant petition alongwith all the listed and pending application(s) stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE SM
